scripts.dev:electron: pnpm build && pnpm build:web && electron dist/electron/main.js
scripts.eval: tsx src/search/eval/runner.ts run --mode frozen --layer 1 --embedder local --embedder-model BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5
scripts.eval:e2e: tsx src/search/eval/runner.ts run --mode frozen --layer 2 --embedder local --embedder-model BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5
scripts.eval:live: tsx src/search/eval/runner.ts run --mode live --layer 2 --embedder local --embedder-model BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5 --embedder-url http://gpu1.skyhouse.dobsys.com:8000/v1
scripts.eval:judge: tsx src/search/eval/runner.ts run --mode frozen --layer 3 --embedder local --embedder-model BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5
scripts.eval:refresh: tsx src/search/eval/runner.ts refresh --embedder local --embedder-model BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5 --embedder-url http://gpu1.skyhouse.dobsys.com:8000/v1
